project_type: Single-file Python FPC plugin (FunPay Cardinal) for reselling SMM services
build_system: None (single .py file, loaded by FPC runtime)
test_framework: None (no tests in repo - plugin runs inside FPC runtime)
verification_instructions: 1. Run AST parse to confirm no syntax errors. 2. Verify VERSION constant is '1.5.03'. 3. Verify auto_review_enabled and auto_review_text are removed from config defaults. 4. Verify _maybe_send_review function is removed. 5. Verify new sales stabilizer feature is present and integrates with existing DW engine.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - single Python file. Just ensure python3 is available.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. No FPC runtime available, so validation is AST-based only. Cannot run the plugin end-to-end.
contribution_requirements: New version files are created alongside old ones (smmway_v1.5.03.py). Old files stay in repo. Branch from main, create new PR.
key_patterns: File sections numbered 1-14 with '# N. TITLE' headers between '# ====' markers
Background loops: while CTX.is_running(): try: time.sleep(...); ... except: logger.exception(...)
Telegram menus: _show_X_menu(c) functions with InlineKeyboardMarkup/Button via _kbd()
Config: DEFAULT_CFG dict (line 369+), persisted via CTX.storage.cfg / save_config()
Callback data prefixed with CB='smw', handler dispatch via if data == f'{CB}:action'
DynamicWorkflows class (DW singleton) at line 2121+ manages service stats, soft-blocking, loyalty
Orders tracked via OrderEntry dataclass, stored in CTX.storage.orders dict keyed by funpay_order_id
relevant_files: smmway_v1.5.02.py (source to copy and modify into smmway_v1.5.03.py)
directory_structure: Flat repo: smmway_v1.3.12.py, smmway_v1.5.01.py, smmway_v1.5.02.py, README.md. All in root.
